<!-- title: TeaScript Submissions -->
<!-- pageid: 1140 -->
<!-- revid: 5058 -->
<!-- timestamp: 2018-01-01T15:20:13Z -->
<!-- source: https://wohlsoft.ru/pgewiki/TeaScript_Submissions -->

[[Category:TeaScript.vbs]]
Here you can share custom scripts made using TeaScript in SMBX 38A. You may add your scripts here. It is recommended to share scripts using [https://wohlsoft.ru/forum/viewtopic.php?f=66&t=1723 SMBX Magic Patcher].

{| class="wikitable" border="1"
!Name
!Author
!Version
!Description
|-
|[[Click.vbs]]
|Yoshi021
|1.1
|A script that will give you values about the mouse and the cursor.
|-
|[https://wohlsoft.ru/forum/viewtopic.php?f=82&p=13409 Catskart Dynamic Message System]
|Catskart
|1
|A new message system different and better than the default one.
|-
|[https://wohlsoft.ru/forum/viewtopic.php?f=82&t=1959 POW Flower]
|the GaMERDoG
|1
|A custom power-up that replaces Ice Flower.
|}
